zh.lifeSummary: Geva de Burcy是Serlo de Burcy的女兒，於1055年之後出生在法國諾門迪。她和Martin至少有1個兒子。她去世於大約1107年在英國英格蘭薩默塞特。

英国威尔斯波斯馬利斯

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Geva de Burcy是Serlo de Burcy的女儿，于1055年之后出生在法国諾門迪。她和Martin至少有1个儿子。她去世于大约1107年在英国英格兰薩默塞特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Burcy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of Swiss German Bürki (see Burki ).
German (Bürky): rare variant of Swiss German Bürki (see Burki ).

variants.name: Burki
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Arabic/Muslim Aamir, Amir, Jamal, Khalid, Mohammed, Sajjad, Shahid, Tariq.  German Kurt, Otto.  French Henri, Marcel, Yves.
Swiss German (Bürki): from an Alemannic pet form of the personal name Burkhart . This surname is also found in France. Compare Berkey , Birkey , Birky , Burkey , and Burky .
Muslim (mainly Pakistan): ethnic name from the name of a Pashtun tribe in Pakistan and Afghanistan.

nameMeanings.name: Geva
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Popular Latinate form of   Eve  , used also as an Anglicization of the Irish name Aoife .

en.lifeSummary: Geva de Burcy was born after 1055, in Normandy, France as the daughter of Serlo de Burcy. She had at least 1 son with Martin. She died about 1107, in Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

Machynlleth, Powys, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Geva de Burcy est née après 1055, à Normandie, France, fille de Serlo de Burcy. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec Martin. Elle est décédée environ 1107, à Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Geva de Burcy wurde nach 1055 in Normandie, Frankreich, als Tochter von Serlo de Burcy geboren. Sie hatte mit Martin mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb um 1107 in Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

Machynlleth, Powys, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom

it.lifeSummary: Geva de Burcy è nata il dopo il 1055 nel Normandie, Francia come figlia di Serlo de Burcy. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio con Martin. Morì circa 1107, nel Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Geva de Burcyは1055年以後にフランスノーマンディでSerlo de Burcyの娘として生まれた。彼女はMartinとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女は約1107年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Geva de Burcy(은)는 1055년 이후 프랑스 노먼디에서 Serlo de Burcy의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 Martin(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1107년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트에서 사망했다.

Machynlleth, Powys, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom

pt.lifeSummary: Geva de Burcy nasceu após 1055, em Normandie, França filha de Serlo de Burcy. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho com Martin. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1107, em Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

Machynlleth, Powys, Țara Galilor, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Geva de Burcy родилась после 1055 г. в местности норманди, Франция. Её отца звали Serlo de Burcy. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от Martin. Она умерла около 1107 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания.

sm.Aft 1055–Abt 1107: ina ua ma'ea le 1055–e tusa o le 1107

es.lifeSummary: Geva de Burcy nació después de 1055, en Normandie, Francia como hija de Serlo de Burcy. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Martin. Murió aproximadamente 1107, en Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
